case_title: HILLSBORO PROPERTIES VS STEEN, STEPHEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HILLSBORO PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT STEEN, STEPHEN STEVENS, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CERT. LETTER TO DAVID STEVEN RETURNED REFUSED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLSBORO PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEEN, STEPHEN STEVENS, DAVID $3,325.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00, $5025 - (3 MONTHS) - $1700 DEPOSIT = $3325. 3 MOS OF VACANCY REASONABLE UNDER CIRCUMSTANCES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
